sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_cos (id UInt32, angle Float64, cosine_value Float64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_cos (id, angle, cosine_value) VALUES (1, 0, cos(0));
UPDATE test_cos SET cosine_value = cos(angle) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, angle, cosine_value FROM test_cos WHERE cosine_value = cos(angle);
INSERT INTO test_cos (id, angle, cosine_value) VALUES (2, 3.14, cos(3.14));
